stimulus: Sandra Voss-Klein and team examined whether the tone of restaurant reviews posted online can predict a restaurant's commercial longevity. The team considered both numeric star ratings and written customer comments. To analyze the written comments, the team measured the warmth—the degree to which a written comment expresses friendly, welcoming feeling—of customer comments on a popular review website, assigning each comment a warmth score. After reading about this research, a student argues that the warmth of restaurant reviews is unrelated to whether a restaurant remains in business over the long term.
stem: Which finding, if true, would most directly weaken the student's conclusion?

answerOptions.content: Restaurants whose comments had the highest average warmth scores received the lowest average star ratings on the review website.
The average warmth score of a restaurant's comments was a strong positive predictor of how many years that restaurant continued to operate after the comments were posted.
More than half of the restaurants the team examined received an average star rating of 3.5 out of 5 stars.
The restaurants that remained in business the longest tended to have high average star ratings.

rationale:
Choice B is the best answer because it most directly weakens the student's conclusion that the warmth of restaurant reviews is unrelated to commercial longevity. If a comment's average warmth score is a strong positive predictor of how many years the restaurant continues to operate, then warmth and longevity are related, contradicting the student's claim.

Choice A is incorrect because it relates warmth to star ratings, not to commercial longevity. It does not address whether warmth predicts how long a restaurant stays in business. Choice C is incorrect because it describes the distribution of star ratings overall and says nothing about warmth or longevity. Choice D is incorrect because it links star ratings to longevity rather than linking warmth to longevity; the student's claim is specifically about warmth.
